text.message: Stealing from me is a sin
Why didn’t you just toss me a wood
Green how are you not stealing from red
Dude just play the game don’t hold a grudge
i dont think im strong enough for solos, im actually pretty stuck
didnt want black to solo but did anyways
im actually in a pretty bad spot, just doesnt look like it with cities
you and black are gonna be in a race to win
and i need to get lucky rolls together
I think green gave up 5 mins ago
Blue i need a wheat to be able to hold road for you
lol you are in the lead
with the wheat and the port
I don’t even have high ore production
the whole game is about table talking
Yeah but you’re saying absurd things
Can yountrade a wheat for a future nb
Yes if you let me take the wood port
Red has it in for me
Red is losing sight of black clearly
I mean he’s never even realized blacks a threat
On 7 points and can take road
I’m not even close to road hahah
And meanwhile im in last lol
What was that about potential, green?
I made an offer when you had 4 wheat earlier for future nb
So should I just hand you the win?
Why do I have to do everything you tell me to do
Keep stealing from the guy in last place
Green red coming for your port
I need a free wood to protect it
I can give you a wood
Free or he will get it
You build 1 road and he can’t
You vs red at this point
To protect it still not doing anything else
Won't take your space on right blue
Blue has to use rb to plow to block connect
im literally just getting rid of cards
Green is more of a threat than red
setting up the plow on a guy who is in last this late in the game
You have to test a dev there
ive been soloed all game and plowed, i dont really care man
Think it was mistake blue not taking 3 1 port first
How many knights are in the game again?
I can build 2 roads to make 11
